feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Two musicians aim to start a creative community in Doncaster to help youths who want to pursue the arts

link.title: Two musicians aim to start a creative community in Doncaster to help youths who want to pursue the arts

entry.content:
A musical duo have used their spare time during the lockdown to write and record their very first rap tracks and want to help other aspiring artists break into the industry.
The lockdown has provided young musicians Lewis Russell and David Walusimbi with the opportunity to work on releasing their first project entitled ‘GSD’ short for Get Stuff Done.
The seven track collection is a combination of rap and pop music all written, produced and sung by the duo.
Lewis, aged 21, from Balby, said: “We are hoping to start a creative collective in Doncaster under the name GSD.
entry.summary: A musical duo have used their spare time during the lockdown to write and record their very first rap tracks and want to help other aspiring artists break into the industry. The lockdown has provided young musicians Lewis Russell and David Walusimbi with the opportunity to work on releasing their first project entitled ‘GSD’ short for Get Stuff Done. The seven track collection is a combination of rap and pop music all written, produced and sung by the duo. Lewis, aged 21, from Balby, said: “We are hoping to start a creative collective in Doncaster under the name GSD.

entry.title: NEWS: JP Morgan: ‘Some businesses will come out stronger’

link.title: NEWS: JP Morgan: ‘Some businesses will come out stronger’

entry.content: JP Morgan Asset Management’s Supreet Bhan gives his take as to what businesses will come out stronger on the other side of this pandemic.
entry.summary: JP Morgan Asset Management’s Supreet Bhan gives his take as to what businesses will come out stronger on the other side of this pandemic.

entry.title: The Comey Rule - Trailer de la série sur Donald Trump

link.title: The Comey Rule - Trailer de la série sur Donald Trump

entry.content: L’histoire de James Comey (joué par Jeff Daniels), qui incarne le directeur du FBI (depuis limogé par Trump). Basé sur ses mémoires A Higher Loyalty, cette série limitée emmène les téléspectateurs dans les coulisses de sa relation turbulente avec le président Trump (Brendan Gleeson). Sur Showtime le 27 septembre prochain.
entry.summary: L’histoire de James Comey (joué par Jeff Daniels), qui incarne le directeur du FBI (depuis limogé par Trump). Basé sur ses mémoires A Higher Loyalty, cette série limitée emmène les téléspectateurs dans les coulisses de sa relation turbulente avec le président Trump (Brendan Gleeson). Sur Showtime le 27 septembre prochain.

entry.title: Khairatabad Ganesh 2020: పూర్తి భిన్నంగా ధన్వంతరి గణపతిగా ఖైరతాబాద్ గణేష్.. భక్తులకు అనుమతి లేదు !

link.title: Khairatabad Ganesh 2020: పూర్తి భిన్నంగా ధన్వంతరి గణపతిగా ఖైరతాబాద్ గణేష్.. భక్తులకు అనుమతి లేదు !

entry.content:
Due to the prevailing COVID pandemic, the Ganesh Utsav Committee has finally settled for a nine-foot tall clay idol in Dhanwantari (Lord Maha Vishnu) model For Khairatabad Ganesh idol.
#KhairatabadGanesh2020
#KhairatabadGaneshPuja
#DhanvantariGanesha
#KhairatabadGaneshidol
#KhairatabadGaneshninefeet
#GaneshChaturthi
#Lordganesh
#ఖైరతాబాద్ గణేష్.
ఖైరతాబాద్‌లో భక్తుల కోరికతో 9 అడుగుల ఎత్తు వరకు ఖైరతాబాద్‌ గణపతి విగ్రహం ఏర్పాటు చేశారు.ఈసారి ఖైరతాబాద్‌లోని గణపయ్య ధన్వంతరి నారాయణుడిగా భక్తులకు దర్శనిమస్తున్నాడు. కొవిడ్‌ మహమ్మారికి ఔషధం తెచ్చే ధన్వంతరి నారాయణ గణపతిగా స్వామి దర్శనమిస్తున్నారు. చేతిలో వనమూలికలు, వైద్య పుస్తకంతో ఉన్న వినాయకుడికి కుడివైపున మహాలక్ష్మీదేవి, ఎడమవైపున సరస్వతి కొలువుదీరారు.
entry.summary: Due to the prevailing COVID pandemic, the Ganesh Utsav Committee has finally settled for a nine-foot tall clay idol in Dhanwantari (Lord Maha Vishnu) model For Khairatabad Ganesh idol. #KhairatabadGanesh2020 #KhairatabadGaneshPuja #DhanvantariGanesha #KhairatabadGaneshidol #KhairatabadGaneshninefeet #GaneshChaturthi #Lordganesh #ఖైరతాబాద్ గణేష్. ఖైరతాబాద్‌లో భక్తుల కోరికతో 9 అడుగుల ఎత్తు వరకు ఖైరతాబాద్‌ గణపతి విగ్రహం ఏర్పాటు చేశారు.ఈసారి ఖైరతాబాద్‌లోని గణపయ్య ధన్వంతరి నారాయణుడిగా భక్తులకు దర్శనిమస్తున్నాడు. కొవిడ్‌ మహమ్మారికి ఔషధం తెచ్చే ధన్వంతరి నారాయణ గణపతిగా స్వామి దర్శనమిస్తున్నారు. చేతిలో వనమూలికలు, వైద్య పుస్తకంతో ఉన్న వినాయకుడికి కుడివైపున మహాలక్ష్మీదేవి, ఎడమవైపున సరస్వతి కొలువుదీరారు.

entry.title: TV Industry Feels There Will Be A Fair Enquiry Now In Sushant Singh Rajput Case

link.title: TV Industry Feels There Will Be A Fair Enquiry Now In Sushant Singh Rajput Case

entry.content: Before Sushant ventured into films, he was a known face on television, thanks to his shows like Kis Desh Mein Hai Meraa Dil and Pavitra Rishta. Here is what some TV actors have to say about the latest development in the case: Mohit Malhotra, "So finally it happened. It’s a victory not just for Sushant’s family, but for all those who stood up for him. With the Supreme Court ordering a CBI investigation, I feel now we will have a fair investigation and we will get to know what happened to him on that fateful day. Sushant’s family can finally get some relief and hopefully they will get a closure soon too." Shashank Vyas, "It was a much needed step and though it’s just the first step towards justice, at least now we can expect an unbiased and fair investigation. I was always in favour of a CBI enquiry, but this goes to his fans, it is their victory." Kamya Punjabi, "Buraai ki hui yeh pehli haar bolo Ganapati Bappa Moryaa Jitega sach" Rashami Desai, "Sooner Or Later, Everyone Sits Down To A Banquet Of Consequences"
entry.summary: Before Sushant ventured into films, he was a known face on television, thanks to his shows like Kis Desh Mein Hai Meraa Dil and Pavitra Rishta. Here is what some TV actors have to say about the latest development in the case: Mohit Malhotra, "So finally it happened. It’s a victory not just for Sushant’s family, but for all those who stood up for him. With the Supreme Court ordering a CBI investigation, I feel now we will have a fair investigation and we will get to know what happened to him on that fateful day. Sushant’s family can finally get some relief and hopefully they will get a closure soon too." Shashank Vyas, "It was a much needed step and though it’s just the first step towards justice, at least now we can expect an unbiased and fair investigation. I was always in favour of a CBI enquiry, but this goes to his fans, it is their victory." Kamya Punjabi, "Buraai ki hui yeh pehli haar bolo Ganapati Bappa Moryaa Jitega sach" Rashami Desai, "Sooner Or Later, Everyone Sits Down To A Banquet Of Consequences"

entry.title: Kathiravan ✖️We Want Tamil Eelam✖️ (prod. by Beatuniverse Instrumentals) (Official 4K Video)

link.title: Kathiravan ✖️We Want Tamil Eelam✖️ (prod. by Beatuniverse Instrumentals) (Official 4K Video)

entry.content:
They blocked us. They deleted us. They made false claims. We are not terrorists. We are freedom fighters. Since the video has been banned, this is the official lyrics video. We stand for our nation and our pride in Tamil history. We want Tamil Eelam.
The first single from the artist Kathiravan about Tiger Music. Like and share this video if you want to hear more Tamil songs. Don’t forget to subscribe to the channel so you don’t miss anything. Stream it everywhere also.
Sie haben uns blockiert. Sie haben uns gelöscht. Sie haben falsche Behauptungen gemacht. Wir sind keine Terroristen. Wir sind Freiheitskämpfer. Da das Video gesperrt wurde ist das die offizielle lyrics Video. Wir stehen für unsere Nation und unser Stolz auf die Geschichte der Tamilen. Wir wollen Tamil Eelam.
Die erste Single vom Künstler Kathiravan über Tiger Musik. Like und teilt dieses Video wenn ihr noch mehr tamilische Songs hören wollt. Kanal abonnieren nicht vergessen um nichts zu verpassen. Auch überall zum Streamen.
Track: We Want Tamil Eelam
Label: Tiger Musik
Kontakt: tigermusik95@gmail.com
Künstler: Kathiravan
Instagram:
Beat prod. by: Beatuniverse Instrumentals
Instagram:
Mixing & Mastering by: Emandrose
Instagram:
Instagram:
Instagram:
Video by: Murat.as
Instagram:
Collaboration with: Tamil Youth Organization (TYO)
Instagram:
Sponsoring by: Rajah Clothes
Instagram:
Link zum original Video:
Im original Video mitgewirkt:
TigerMusik Crew:
Ensy
Instagram:
Fidel
Instagram:
Mike
Instagram:
Elias
Instagram:
Rahavan
Instagram:
Rajithan
Instagram:
Rugi
Instagram:
Thisha
Instagram:
Rannush
Instagram:
Underdogzz Recordzz Crew
Prani & Crew
Instagram:
TIGERMUSIK
entry.summary: They blocked us. They deleted us. They made false claims. We are not terrorists. We are freedom fighters. Since the video has been banned, this is the official lyrics video. We stand for our nation and our pride in Tamil history. We want Tamil Eelam. The first single from the artist Kathiravan about Tiger Music. Like and share this video if you want to hear more Tamil songs. Don’t forget to subscribe to the channel so you don’t miss anything. Stream it everywhere also. Sie haben uns blockiert. Sie haben uns gelöscht. Sie haben falsche Behauptungen gemacht. Wir sind keine Terroristen. Wir sind Freiheitskämpfer. Da das Video gesperrt wurde ist das die offizielle lyrics Video. Wir stehen für unsere Nation und unser Stolz auf die Geschichte der Tamilen. Wir wollen Tamil Eelam. Die erste Single vom Künstler Kathiravan über Tiger Musik. Like und teilt dieses Video wenn ihr noch mehr tamilische Songs hören wollt. Kanal abonnieren nicht vergessen um nichts zu verpassen. Auch überall zum Streamen. Track: We Want Tamil Eelam Label: Tiger Musik Kontakt: tigermusik95@gmail.com Künstler: Kathiravan Instagram: Beat prod. by: Beatuniverse Instrumentals Instagram: Mixing & Mastering by: Emandrose Instagram: Instagram: Instagram: Video by: Murat.as Instagram: Collaboration with: Tamil Youth Organization (TYO) Instagram: Sponsoring by: Rajah Clothes Instagram: Link zum original Video: Im original Video mitgewirkt: TigerMusik Crew: Ensy Instagram: Fidel Instagram: Mike Instagram: Elias Instagram: Rahavan Instagram: Rajithan Instagram: Rugi Instagram: Thisha Instagram: Rannush Instagram: Underdogzz Recordzz Crew Prani & Crew Instagram: TIGERMUSIK

entry.title: Guy Does Cool Spinning Trick While Wakesurfing

link.title: Guy Does Cool Spinning Trick While Wakesurfing

entry.content:
This guy did some cool tricks while doing wakesurfing. He did multiple spins while jumping with his surfboard on the water’s surface. Also, his balancing was outstanding as the boat was running a quite good speed.
The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
entry.summary: This guy did some cool tricks while doing wakesurfing. He did multiple spins while jumping with his surfboard on the water’s surface. Also, his balancing was outstanding as the boat was running a quite good speed. The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).

entry.title: Nevada en el sector de Papallacta 2020

link.title: Nevada en el sector de Papallacta 2020

entry.content: Un manto de nieve cubrió el sector de Papallacta, las bajas temperaturas provocaron la caída de nieve y el cierre de la vía Pifo - Papallacta, por motivos de seguridad
entry.summary: Un manto de nieve cubrió el sector de Papallacta, las bajas temperaturas provocaron la caída de nieve y el cierre de la vía Pifo - Papallacta, por motivos de seguridad

entry.title: Kareena Kapoor ही नहीं इन Actress ने भी Baby Bump के साथ किया था Ramp Walk Boldsky

link.title: Kareena Kapoor ही नहीं इन Actress ने भी Baby Bump के साथ किया था Ramp Walk Boldsky

entry.content:
Kareena Kapoor’s pregnancy news has once again brought pregnancy fashion into the news. Because in the first pregnancy Kareena made a lot of headlines with her stylish look and dressing sense. At the same time, Kareena had also done a time ramp walk of pregnancy, which was very much in the headlines. In such a situation, today we have brought pictures of actresses who walked the ramp with baby bump and made huge headlines.
करीना कपूर की प्रेग्नेंसी की खबरों ने एक बार फिर से प्रेग्नेंसी फैशन को चर्चा में ला दिया है। क्योंकि करीना ने पहली ही प्रेग्नेंसी में अपने स्टाइलिश लुक और ड्रेसिंग सेंस से काफी सुर्खियां बटोरी थी। वहीं करीना ने प्रेग्नेंसी के टाइम रैंप वॉक भी किया था, जो काफी सुर्खियों में था। ऐसे में आज हम लेकर आए हैं उन एक्ट्रेसेज की तस्वीरें जिन्होंने बेबी बंप के साथ रैंप पर वॉक किया था और जमकर सुर्खियां बटोरी थीं।
#Kareenakapoor #Babybump #Rampwalk
entry.summary: Kareena Kapoor’s pregnancy news has once again brought pregnancy fashion into the news. Because in the first pregnancy Kareena made a lot of headlines with her stylish look and dressing sense. At the same time, Kareena had also done a time ramp walk of pregnancy, which was very much in the headlines. In such a situation, today we have brought pictures of actresses who walked the ramp with baby bump and made huge headlines. करीना कपूर की प्रेग्नेंसी की खबरों ने एक बार फिर से प्रेग्नेंसी फैशन को चर्चा में ला दिया है। क्योंकि करीना ने पहली ही प्रेग्नेंसी में अपने स्टाइलिश लुक और ड्रेसिंग सेंस से काफी सुर्खियां बटोरी थी। वहीं करीना ने प्रेग्नेंसी के टाइम रैंप वॉक भी किया था, जो काफी सुर्खियों में था। ऐसे में आज हम लेकर आए हैं उन एक्ट्रेसेज की तस्वीरें जिन्होंने बेबी बंप के साथ रैंप पर वॉक किया था और जमकर सुर्खियां बटोरी थीं। #Kareenakapoor #Babybump #Rampwalk

Arino’s Challenge… "R-TYPE I-II
This is the kind of rice shop you should go to occasionally…Kanda Rice Shop, 3-28-1 Yayoi-cho, Nakano-ku, Tokyo

entry.title: Guy Balances Girl on Both Hands While she Does Handstand

link.title: Guy Balances Girl on Both Hands While she Does Handstand

entry.content: This duo did an amazing handstand balancing trick. The guy held both hands of the girl and held her upside down straight. After that, the girl performed a handstand following a single-handstand maintaining a perfect balance overall.
entry.summary: This duo did an amazing handstand balancing trick. The guy held both hands of the girl and held her upside down straight. After that, the girl performed a handstand following a single-handstand maintaining a perfect balance overall.

entry.title: Acusan oficialmente a Netflix de incitar a la pedofilia por este vídeo

link.title: Acusan oficialmente a Netflix de incitar a la pedofilia por este vídeo

entry.content:
a plataforma Netflix ha sido acusada de sexualizar a menores tras publicar el cartel y la sinopsis de ‘Cuties’ (‘Guapis’ en España), película francesa que se estrenará el próximo 9 de septiembre.
La serie narra la historia de una niña de 11 años que intenta evitar problemas familiares y descubre el ‘twerking’.
La polémica surgió después de que Netflix publicara el tráiler del filme en línea, con la sinopsis que decía:
"Amy tiene once años y quiere pertenecer a un grupo de chicas de su edad que bailan sensualmente. Entonces empieza a explorar la feminidad y desafiar a su familia religiosa".
El cartel mostraba a cuatro niñas posando de forma provocadora y vestidas de una forma que, en opinión de numerosos usuarios, no es la apropiada para menores de su edad.
entry.summary: a plataforma Netflix ha sido acusada de sexualizar a menores tras publicar el cartel y la sinopsis de ‘Cuties’ (‘Guapis’ en España), película francesa que se estrenará el próximo 9 de septiembre. La serie narra la historia de una niña de 11 años que intenta evitar problemas familiares y descubre el ‘twerking’. La polémica surgió después de que Netflix publicara el tráiler del filme en línea, con la sinopsis que decía: "Amy tiene once años y quiere pertenecer a un grupo de chicas de su edad que bailan sensualmente. Entonces empieza a explorar la feminidad y desafiar a su familia religiosa". El cartel mostraba a cuatro niñas posando de forma provocadora y vestidas de una forma que, en opinión de numerosos usuarios, no es la apropiada para menores de su edad.

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput case: CBI Investigation में Accountant ने किए अहम खुलासे वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput case: CBI Investigation में Accountant ने किए अहम खुलासे वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Everyone now has high hopes from the CBI in the case of Sushant Singh Rajput’s death. All the people who want Sushant believe that CBI will do full justice with this case. And ever since this case has gone into the hands of the CBI, this case has gained momentum. The CBI is trying to get to the bottom of the case every day. And because of this, CBI is questioning all the people related to this case. Now in this connection Sushant’s accountant Rajat Mewati has been questioned by the CBI.
सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत के मामले में अब सभी को सीबीआई से काफी उम्मीदें हैं। सुशांत के चाहने वाले सभी लोगों को विश्वास है कि सीबीआई इस केस के साथ पूरा जस्टीस करेगी। और जब से ये केस सीबीआई के हाथों में गया है तबसे इस केस केस में तेजी आई है। सीबीआई हर दिन इस केस के तह तक जाने की कोशिश में है। और इसी के चलते वो इस केस से जुड़े सभी लोगों से पूछताछ कर रही है। अब इसी सिलसिले में सुशांत के अकाउंटेंट रहे रजत मेवाती से सीबीआई ने पूछताछ की है।
#SSRcaseUpdate #SushantSinghRajput
entry.summary: Everyone now has high hopes from the CBI in the case of Sushant Singh Rajput’s death. All the people who want Sushant believe that CBI will do full justice with this case. And ever since this case has gone into the hands of the CBI, this case has gained momentum. The CBI is trying to get to the bottom of the case every day. And because of this, CBI is questioning all the people related to this case. Now in this connection Sushant’s accountant Rajat Mewati has been questioned by the CBI. सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत के मामले में अब सभी को सीबीआई से काफी उम्मीदें हैं। सुशांत के चाहने वाले सभी लोगों को विश्वास है कि सीबीआई इस केस के साथ पूरा जस्टीस करेगी। और जब से ये केस सीबीआई के हाथों में गया है तबसे इस केस केस में तेजी आई है। सीबीआई हर दिन इस केस के तह तक जाने की कोशिश में है। और इसी के चलते वो इस केस से जुड़े सभी लोगों से पूछताछ कर रही है। अब इसी सिलसिले में सुशांत के अकाउंटेंट रहे रजत मेवाती से सीबीआई ने पूछताछ की है। #SSRcaseUpdate #SushantSinghRajput

entry.title: Priyanka Chopra And Seaside Are Two Favourite Things Of Singer Nick Jonas

link.title: Priyanka Chopra And Seaside Are Two Favourite Things Of Singer Nick Jonas

entry.content:
"Priyanka Chopra Jonas and Nick Jonas are amongst the entertainment industry’s most iconic couples.The popular singer, meanwhile, recently posted #flashbackfriday post on his Instagram account by which we can say he is feeling nostalgic.
.
Two years ago Priyanka Chopra Jonas and Nick Jonas got married. They make for the showbiz world’s most lovable couple. Maybe the best thing is, the lovebirds are inseparable! Whether it’s the famous Met Gala or a family event, Nick and Priyanka are always alongside each other. Their love story is nothing short of a fairy tale.
As we talk about this, Nick Jonas recently posted on his Instagram handle a throwback photo of wife Priyanka which is worth a glimpse for all her fans. The actress sitting facing the seaside wearing a white crochet dress, and a couple of cool shades.
Besides that, there’s another reason to be excited for Priyanka Chopra Jonas’ fans as the actress has recently completed her memoir titled ‘Unfinished.’ She also posted the front cover of the same on social media while back.
While, the actress last appeared in The Sky is Pink which also features in the lead roles Farhan Akhtar, Zaira Wasim, and Rohit Suresh Saraf. She has also lined up a couple more projects that include Matrix 4, and We Can Be Heroes.
"
entry.summary: "Priyanka Chopra Jonas and Nick Jonas are amongst the entertainment industry’s most iconic couples.The popular singer, meanwhile, recently posted #flashbackfriday post on his Instagram account by which we can say he is feeling nostalgic. . Two years ago Priyanka Chopra Jonas and Nick Jonas got married. They make for the showbiz world’s most lovable couple. Maybe the best thing is, the lovebirds are inseparable! Whether it’s the famous Met Gala or a family event, Nick and Priyanka are always alongside each other. Their love story is nothing short of a fairy tale. As we talk about this, Nick Jonas recently posted on his Instagram handle a throwback photo of wife Priyanka which is worth a glimpse for all her fans. The actress sitting facing the seaside wearing a white crochet dress, and a couple of cool shades. Besides that, there’s another reason to be excited for Priyanka Chopra Jonas’ fans as the actress has recently completed her memoir titled ‘Unfinished.’ She also posted the front cover of the same on social media while back. While, the actress last appeared in The Sky is Pink which also features in the lead roles Farhan Akhtar, Zaira Wasim, and Rohit Suresh Saraf. She has also lined up a couple more projects that include Matrix 4, and We Can Be Heroes. "

entry.title: Réforme du Franc Cfa, maintien de la parité fixe & avantages pour les économies africaines

link.title: Réforme du Franc Cfa, maintien de la parité fixe & avantages pour les économies africaines

entry.content:
Réforme du Franc Cfa : Le Méga-économiste, Anikpo Daniel et le Directeur de la Capec, Pr Ahouré Alban Alphonse, confrontent leurs idées
La réforme du Franc Cfa est au centre de plusieurs préoccupations dans les États africains. Regards croisés du Méga-économiste, Anikpo Daniel et du Professeur Ahouré Alban Alphonse, Enseignant-chercheur à l’UFR des sciences économiques et de gestion de l’Université Félix Houphouet Boigny, Directeur de la Cellule d’analyses de politique économique du Cires (Capec).
entry.summary: Réforme du Franc Cfa : Le Méga-économiste, Anikpo Daniel et le Directeur de la Capec, Pr Ahouré Alban Alphonse, confrontent leurs idées La réforme du Franc Cfa est au centre de plusieurs préoccupations dans les États africains. Regards croisés du Méga-économiste, Anikpo Daniel et du Professeur Ahouré Alban Alphonse, Enseignant-chercheur à l’UFR des sciences économiques et de gestion de l’Université Félix Houphouet Boigny, Directeur de la Cellule d’analyses de politique économique du Cires (Capec).

entry.title: ‘Jeannette et les fées du temps qu’il fait’ de Marie-Pierre Planchon

link.title: ‘Jeannette et les fées du temps qu’il fait’ de Marie-Pierre Planchon

entry.content:
Jeannette est une petite fille qui adore regarder le ciel et voir le soleil se lever. Mais depuis qu’elle habite dans sa nouvelle maison dans le Nord, le ciel est désespérément de la même couleur : gris, gris ! Alors, en voyant cette petite Jeannette bien désemparée et perdue dans les caprices du temps, Les fées du temps qu’il fait décidèrent de prendre les choses en mains et de se réunir pour discuter de la situation.
Avec Nicole Ferroni et Charline Vanhoenacker
Retrouvez Une histoire et … Oli ! sur France Inter :
entry.summary: Jeannette est une petite fille qui adore regarder le ciel et voir le soleil se lever. Mais depuis qu’elle habite dans sa nouvelle maison dans le Nord, le ciel est désespérément de la même couleur : gris, gris ! Alors, en voyant cette petite Jeannette bien désemparée et perdue dans les caprices du temps, Les fées du temps qu’il fait décidèrent de prendre les choses en mains et de se réunir pour discuter de la situation. Avec Nicole Ferroni et Charline Vanhoenacker Retrouvez Une histoire et … Oli ! sur France Inter :
